rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HELENA NICKOLAS GRIBANOWSKI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross Defendant Gribanowskis Demurrer And Motion To Strike To Cross Complainants Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to First, Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action are sustained with leave to amend. Demurrer to Second and Third Causes of Action are sustained without leave to amend. Motion to Strike is denied. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on June 30, 2011.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Orders Compelling Further Responses To Second Request For Production And Compelling Production, Compelling Further Responses To Second Set Of Special Interrogatories, And Awarding Sanctions Against Contestants And Their Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Martinez¿ motion to compel further responses to 2nd request for production and compelling further responses to 2nd set of special interrogatories and request for sanctions. Document demand #35 ¿ tentative ruling: Contestants to bring to court for in camera all documents responsive to demand #35 and for which work product protection is claimed. Contestant is to submit a work product protection log along with said documents. Special interrogatories ¿ tentative ruling: Denied as to all special interrogatories (91, 95, 96, 97, 98, 106, 107 and 112) Sanctions ¿ tentative ruling: Reserved pending in camera review. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on June 30, 2011.
